description_long: This rifle features a distinctive bullpup configuration with a compact, angular body and a prominent carrying handle integrated into the upper receiver. The exterior is finished in a striking camouflage pattern of yellow and dark gray, with a honeycomb texture on the stock and geometric striping on the grip and magazine area. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a small, cylindrical muzzle device. The trigger and magazine are positioned behind the pistol grip, characteristic of bullpup designs, optimizing overall length without sacrificing barrel length. The rifle includes iron sights integrated into the top rail, and the stock is fixed, blending seamlessly into the rear of the weapon. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with polymer components for the stock and grip, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact bullpup rifle with a yellow and dark gray camouflage finish, honeycomb-textured stock, and integrated iron sights. The design is modern and tactical, featuring a fixed stock and short barrel.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow muzzle, front sight, and the slim profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the honeycomb pattern on the stock, the angular carrying handle, and the camouflage finish.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the stock, the top rail, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the magazine well, trigger, and the continuation of the camouflage and honeycomb textures.
